title: Creating a Percentage Formula with correct decimals points
excerpt:
Hello, 
I am trying to create a loan-to-value from a formula using two columns. 1st column would be a loan amount of $300,000 divided by a value of $400,000 to equal a Loan-To-Value percentage for 75.00%

posts.author: patpen (Patrick)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello,
I am trying to create a loan-to-value from a formula using two columns. 1st column would be a loan amount of $300,000 divided by a value of $400,000 to equal a Loan-To-Value percentage for 75.00%

posts.author: GCavin (Gilles Cavin - Reinventing Formulas in monday.com)
patpen (Patrick)
posts.cookedHtml: Thank you very much GCavin, I appreciate you for this help!
